version.name: 0.54-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.54-beta :
- About：Performance: Optimized initial loading speed.
- Qi：Bug Fix: Fixed assertions during the initialization process；Optimization: Refined the initialization sequence；Database: Converted database loading to asynchronous mode.
- WwiseTools：Initialization: Optimized the initialization loading order；Asynchronous Loading: Implemented asynchronous loading for Wwu and Bnk files；File Scanning: Optimized the underlying file scanning logic.
- Region Flow；Performance: Enhanced UI/system response speed；Stability: Added boundary protection (edge-case handling) to prevent crashes or errors.
-- Mantrika Team -- 2026-04.16
